zh.Hope, Shropshire, England: 英國英格蘭史洛普爾霍普
zh.lifeSummary: Richard Baggard於1230年出生在英國英格蘭史洛普爾。他於1250年與Lady Ann在英國斯塔福爾霍普結婚。他們至少是1個兒子的父母。他去世於1280年在他的家鄉享年50歲。

zh-hans.Hope, Shropshire, England: 英国英格兰史洛普爾霍普
zh-hans.lifeSummary: Richard Baggard于1230年出生在英国英格兰史洛普爾。他于1250年与Lady Ann在英国斯塔福爾霍普结婚。他们至少是1个儿子的父母。他去世于1280年在他的家乡享年50岁。

nameMeanings.name: Baggard
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: from the Old French personal name Magard, ancient Germanic Maghard, from elements meaning ‘power’ + ‘hard, strong’. Maggard is on record as a surname in medieval Suffolk but is now rare or absent in Britain. See also Madgett and Matchett .

variants.name: Madge
meanings: English: from the Middle English female personal name Magge, a pet form of either Margery or Margaret (compare Maggard and see Margeson ).

variants.name: Madgett
meanings: English (Norfolk): perhaps a variant pronunciation of Maggard , from the Old French personal name Magard, Machard, with reduction of -ard to -et, or perhaps from Maget or Machet as Old French pet forms of the same name + the diminutive suffix -et. Matchett is probably another variant. Alternatively, Madgett is from a Middle English female personal name Magget, an unrecorded diminutive form of Magge (see Madge ), itself a pet form of either Margery or Margaret.

nameMeanings.name: Richard
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: One of the most enduringly successful of the Old French personal names introduced into Britain by the Normans. It is of Germanic (Frankish) origin, derived from rīc ‘power’ + hard ‘strong, hardy’. It has enjoyed continuous popularity in England from the Conquest to the present day, influenced by the fact that it was borne by three kings of England, in particular Richard I ( 1157–99 ). He was king for only ten years ( 1189–99 ), most of which he spent in warfare abroad, taking part in the Third Crusade and costing the people of England considerable sums in taxes. Nevertheless, he achieved the status of a folk hero, and was never in England long enough to disappoint popular faith in his goodness and justice. He was also Duke of Aquitaine and Normandy and Count of Anjou, fiefs which he held at a time of maximum English expansion in France. His exploits as a leader of the Third Crusade earned him the nickname ‘Coeur de Lion’ or ‘Lionheart’ and a permanent place in popular imagination, in which he was even more firmly enshrined by Sir Walter Scott's novel Ivanhoe ( 1820 ).

variants.name: Rikert

en.lifeSummary: Richard Baggard was born in 1230, in Shropshire, England, United Kingdom. He married Lady Ann in 1250, in Hope, Staffordshire, England. They were the parents of at least 1 son. He died in 1280, in his hometown, at the age of 50.

fr.lifeSummary: Richard Baggard est né en 1230, à Shropshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Il a épousé Lady Ann en 1250, à Hope, Staffordshire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils. Il est décédé en 1280, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 50 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Richard Baggard wurde 1230 in Shropshire, England, United Kingdom geboren. Er hat 1250 in Hope, Staffordshire, England Lady Ann geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn. Er starb 1280 im Alter von 50 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort.

it.lifeSummary: Richard Baggard è nato il nel 1230 nel Shropshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Lui sposato Lady Ann nel 1250, nel Hope, Staffordshire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio. Morì nel 1280, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 50 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Richard Baggardは1230年にイギリスイギリスシュロプシュアイアで生まれた。1250年にイギリススタフォードシュアイアホーペでLady Annと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子の親であった。彼は1280年に故郷で50歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Richard Baggard(은)는 1230년 영국 잉글랜드 슈럽실르에서 태어났다. 그는 1250년 영국 스태퍼드실르 홉에서 Lady Ann(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1280년 그의 고향에서 50세의 나이로 사망했다.

mn.Hope, Shropshire, England: Hope, Salopesberia, Англи, Нэгдсэн Вант Улс

pt.lifeSummary: Richard Baggard nasceu em 1230, em Shropshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Ele casou-se com Lady Ann em 1250, em Hope, Staffordshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho. Ele faleceu em 1280, em sua cidade natal, com 50 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Richard Baggard родился в 1230 г. в местности шропшир, Англия, Великобритания. Он женился на женщине по имени Lady Ann в 1250 г. в местности хоп, стаффордшир, Англия. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын. Он умер в 1280 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 50 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Richard Baggard nació en 1230, en Shropshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Se casó con Lady Ann en 1250, en Hope, Staffordshire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo. Murió en 1280, en su pueblo, a la edad de 50 años.
